title: Looking for Teacher at Jetking Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Jetking Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Jetking Ventures Solutions in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Jetking Ventures Solutions:
Jetking Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking Ventures Solutions!
